emails.subject: Opinions
emails.body: Opinions Kay, I hate to sound stupid, but............do you want all of the letters redlined or just the highlighted one? You want the date at the top of the letter to be September 13, 2001 right? Have the changes been made that these guys are talking about or is that something else? Do you want me to do a new version or just put on the track changes to pick up all the changes that have been made to the letters?

emails.subject: RE: Opinions
emails.body: RE: Opinions So you just want the new changes to be redlined correct? To: Adams, Suzanne

emails.subject: RE: Opinions
emails.body: They are all done and in a folder on my desk whenever you are ready for them. To: Adams, Suzanne

emails.subject: Opinions
emails.body: Opinions You should be getting a fax from Maurice re ees llc opinion. Please send me an email describing the changes he is requesting. Thanks. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Opinions
emails.body: RE: Opinions Ok To: Adams, Suzanne

emails.subject: RE: Opinions
emails.body: RE: Opinions Please let me know if you learn anything at the floor meeting. Kay Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Opinions
emails.body: I'm concerned about my check right now. They didn't pay us for our overtime (mistake) and took out for the Energizer so all of our checks are short. I'm freaking at the moment, but I think it'll be ok. To: Adams, Suzanne

emails.subject: RE: Opinions
emails.body: RE: Opinions This is all so unreal. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Opinions
emails.body: Oh, I'm so pissed! You don't mess around with people's money, but I think it was just a mistake and they are correcting it now. I'm trying not to freak out just yet! To: Adams, Suzanne

emails.subject: RE: Opinions
emails.body: RE: Opinions We are all fragile. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Opinions
emails.body: Yes, we are! There's been no fax yet. I'm just a wreck. I'm going to have to have a margarita at lunch! To: Adams, Suzanne

emails.subject: RE: Opinions
emails.body: RE: Opinions Could you email me the new sentence on page 2? Were those the only 2 changes? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Opinions
emails.body: RE: Opinions Oik to make changes, change out original. What did Mark say? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Opinions
emails.body: RE: Opinions You don't need to get it signed, just substitute the new pages. Yes I like perfume. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>
